author: y4rr
content: Implemented via commit 306271bc. Added MobileNetV2 (InvertedResidual blocks with paper-faithful (t,c,n,s) stage config), MobileNetV3-Small (simplified V3Block pipeline), DenseNet-121 (DenseLayer + DenseBlock + TransitionLayer with cat-based feature reuse), and Inception v3 (four-branch InceptionModule). All four registered in ferrotorch_vision::models::REGISTRY and ferrotorch_hub::registry with updated canonical-name tests. Simplifications (no depthwise, no SE, no batch norm, no h-swish) documented in module docs. 26 new tests; 289 ferrotorch-vision tests pass.
